headlines.title: Map: See how gas prices have changed in the county where you live
headlines.description: How much gas prices have increased during the Iran war depends entirely on where you live, an NBC News analysis of average gas price data from AAA shows.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Few deals from Trump’s trip and no progress on Iran send global markets into a sell-off
headlines.description: Government bonds around the world sold off sharply Friday as the price of oil jumped, both driven by developments in the Iran war, politics and trade.

headlines.title: Markets Plunge Amid Concerns About Aftermath of China Summit
headlines.description: Markets plunged on Friday with the Dow falling more than 500 points, with investors concerned over the lack of any major agreement between the U.S and China. NBC’s Allie Canal reports for Saturday TODAY.

headlines.title: Is Subscription Fatigue Alienating Frustrated Consumers?
headlines.description: There is now a subscription available for about every aspect of life, including for car washes, clothes, toilet paper and even underwear. While they are often associated with a deal, the pile up of the recurring charges on credit cards is generating subscription fatigue with 52 percent of consumers canceling at least one subscription in the past year, according to market analysis. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Coffee company employs people struggling with homelessness and gives them a second chance
headlines.description: Casters Coffee in California has been employing people who are struggling with homelessness. For four days a week, the wholesaler pays and trains up to 30 unhoused people, learning a skill they can use to secure a job. NBC News' Steve Paterson show us how this program is giving people a second chance.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: ‘Get in loser, we’re buying Spirit’: One man’s viral plan to revive the airline
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines was the budget-friendly carrier America loved to hate.

headlines.title: Zillow CEO Jeremy Wacksman is preparing for the next revolution in real estate
headlines.description: Zillow CEO Jeremy Wacksman on AI coming to the real estate industry. Buyers and sellers today have far more information than they did a few decades ago.

headlines.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras soars 90% in year’s biggest IPO so far
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Cerebras surged 90% in its trading debut, setting the bar for the biggest initial public stock offering of the year so far.

headlines.title: Why the prices of World Cup resale tickets are falling
headlines.description: After an initial furor over jaw-dropping ticket prices, global soccer fans may be starting to see some relief — at least in the resale market.
